summary: Iteration 25 - Tested Save & Compare Strategies feature. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. The feature uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o) for AI generation - NOT MOCKED.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/save requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: GET /api/ai/strategies requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: DELETE /api/ai/strategies/{id} requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/save saves strategy with all fields (label, strategy, data_summary, release_title, genre)
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/save creates default label if not provided
Backend: GET /api/ai/strategies returns list of saved strategies with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/ai/strategies excludes MongoDB _id from response
Backend: DELETE /api/ai/strategies/{id} returns 404 for non-existent strategy
Backend: DELETE /api/ai/strategies/{id} successfully deletes strategy
Backend: POST /api/ai/release-strategy still works (regression from iteration 24)
Backend: Cleanup test strategies works
Frontend: Fan Analytics page (/fan-analytics) loads with all charts and AI section
Frontend: 'Generate AI Strategy' button generates strategy with loading state
Frontend: After generating, 'Save Strategy' button appears in results
Frontend: Clicking 'Save Strategy' shows label input and Save/Cancel buttons
Frontend: Saving shows toast notification 'Strategy saved!'
Frontend: 'Saved (N)' counter in header updates after save
Frontend: Clicking 'Saved (N)' button shows saved strategies list panel
Frontend: Each saved strategy card shows label, date, release day/time, and streams
Frontend: Delete button on saved strategy cards works with toast notification
Frontend: 'Compare' button appears when 2+ saved strategies exist
Frontend: Compare mode allows selecting 2 strategies (A and B badges)
Frontend: Compare view shows side-by-side comparison with all fields
Frontend: Compare view shows Best Day, Best Time, Streams Analyzed, Top Platform, Top Country, Est. First Week
Frontend: Compare view shows Platform Priorities with priority levels
Frontend: Compare view shows Pre-Release Timeline Steps count
critical_code_review_comments: Save & Compare Strategies uses REAL Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o) - NOT MOCKED
Backend properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Toast notifications using 'sonner' library work correctly
Compare view properly handles N/A values for missing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested the new Save & Compare Strategies feature. Backend endpoints: POST /api/ai/strategies/save (saves strategy), GET /api/ai/strategies (returns list), DELETE /api/ai/strategies/{id} (deletes). Frontend components: SavedStrategiesPanel shows saved strategies with delete buttons, CompareView shows side-by-side comparison when 2 strategies selected. MongoDB collection: saved_strategies. Uses REAL Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o) for AI generation. AI call takes 5-15 seconds.
